message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Specialist Doctor" as doctor
participant ":CreateReportUI" as ui
participant ":CreateReportController" as controller
participant ":Company" as company
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as testDiagnosis
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as reportStore

doctor -> ui: 1 asks to create a new diagnosis
activate ui
ref "US4_SD_testsDTO.puml"
deactivate ui

ui -> doctor: 2 requests to choose a given test
doctor -> ui: 3 chooses a given test
activate ui
ui -> controller: 4 createTestDiagnosis(idTest)
activate controller
controller -> testDiagnosis: 5 createTestDiagnosis(test)
activate testDiagnosis
testDiagnosis -> testDiagnosis: 6 createTestDiagnosis(testParameterList)
activate testDiagnosis
testDiagnosis -> testDiagnosis: obj : diagnosis
deactivate testDiagnosis
testDiagnosis -> controller: 7 getDiagnosis()
deactivate testDiagnosis
controller -> ui: 8 getDiagnosis()
deactivate controller
ui -> doctor: 9 shows the diagnosis done automatically and requests the data for the report
doctor -> ui: 10 types the requested data
activate ui
ui -> controller: 11 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
activate controller
controller -> controller: 12 store = getTestReportStore()
activate controller
controller -> reportStore: 13 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
activate reportStore
reportStore -> reportStore: 14 create(idTest, diagnosis, report)
deactivate reportStore
controller -> reportStore: 15 validateReport()
activate reportStore
deactivate reportStore
ui -> doctor: 16 shows the typed data and asks for confirmation
doctor -> ui: 17 confirms the data
activate ui
ui -> controller: 18 saveReport(report)
activate controller
controller -> company: 19 saveReport(report)
activate company
company -> reportStore: 20 saveReport(report)
activate reportStore
reportStore -> reportStore: 21 validateReport(report)
activate reportStore
deactivate reportStore
reportStore -> reportStore: 22 addReport(report)
activate reportStore
deactivate reportStore
deactivate company
deactivate controller
ui -> doctor: 23 informs operation success
deactivate ui

@enduml
